title: Avocado Mexican Crepes
description: Delicious and creamy crepes filled with a Mexican twist.
instructions: 1. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, sugar, and cinnamon.
2. Add the flour and whisk until smooth.
3. Heat a small non-stick pan over medium heat.
4. Pour a small amount of the batter into the pan and tilt to evenly coat the bottom.
5. Cook for 1-2 minutes or until the edges start to curl.
6. Loosen with a spatula and flip.
9. In a separate pan, heat the creme mexicaine over low heat.
10. Add the mashed avocado and stir until combined.
11. Add the crispy tortilla crumble and stir until combined.
12. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
13. To assemble, place a crepe on a plate and spread a spoonful of the avocado mixture on top.
14. Fold the crepe in half and serve with a dollop of creme mexicaine on top.
